children.heading: Sense of Congress concerning inadequacy of sentencing guidelines
children.label: a Sense of Congress concerning inadequacy of sentencing guidelines
children.text: It is the sense of Congress that the sentencing guidelines prescribed by the United States Sentencing Commission for the offenses of importation, attempted importation, exportation, and attempted exportation of nuclear, biological, and chemical weapons materials constitute inadequate punishment for such offenses.

children.heading: Urging of revision to guidelines
children.label: b Urging of revision to guidelines
